title: Love that fills
html: [Intro] G D G D G Even in the darkest hours D A I will run to you, my Father G You have what I need D A You are what I seek G In the midst of pain and trial D A I'll hold on to you, my Father G You have what I need D A You are what I seek G You are love that fills D A Every corner of my heart G You are love that overflows Bm A My deepest holes G You are grace that displays D A Goodness unpredictable G A D And I'll lay all I am to You G Even in the darkest hours D A I will run to you, my Father G You have what I need D A You are what I seek G In the midst of pain and trial D A I'll hold on to you, my Father G You have what I need D A You're just what I seek G You are love that fills D A Every corner of my heart G You are love that overflows Bm A My deepest holes G You are grace that displays D A Goodness unpredictable G A D And I'll lay all I am to You ( G D G D ) ( G D G D ) G D All I am to You G D All I am to You G D All I am to You G A D Yes, I'll lay all I am to you G D All I am to You G D All I am to You G D All I am to You G A D Yes, I'll lay all I am to you G You are love that fills D A Every corner of my heart G You are love that overflows Bm A My deepest holes G You are grace that displays D A Goodness unpredictable G A D And I'll lay all I am to You G A D And I'll lay all I am to You
